name: Retroactive GST Exemption Allocation

eligibility.description: Applies when a non-skip person beneficiary dies before the transferor, allowing the transferor to protect the trust from GST tax using values from the original transfer date.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a transferor to retroactively allocate unused GST exemption to previous transfers if a non-skip person (who is a lineal descendant) predeceases the transferor.
